metadata.description: Track and analyze Claude Code tool usage — discover which skills, agents, MCP tools, and commands are actually used, find zombie configs, and visualize usage trends.

plugins.name: claude-census
plugins.description: Track and analyze Claude Code tool usage with zero token cost. PostToolUse hook logs every skill, agent, MCP tool, and command invocation to SQLite. /census command provides usage dashboard, zombie detection, and trend analysis.
